pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
lca_tool: One Click LCA Concrete EPD Generator v3.2.3
scope: Cradle to gate with options, A4-A5, and modules C1-C4, D
notes: Source typo: p2 'Manufacturer' field reads 'Entire, Hunter Vallet=y, NSW, Australia' (garbled location text with stray '=' in 'Valley', and no company name) instead of the company name; manufacturer normalized to 'Entire Concrete' per the company name used consistently elsewhere in the document (cover page, 'Who We Are' section) and matching sibling EPD HUB-5943 from the same manufacturer.
Source typo: p1 footer renders the product name as 'N40/20/Xencrete' (slash) vs 'N40/20 Xencrete' used everywhere else (title, p2 product name field, headers).
p2 'Address' field reads 'Entire – VWA Plant' rather than a street address (cf. HUB-5943 which gives a full street address) — recorded as-is, not used elsewhere in this record.
B1–B7 all ND (use stage not assessed). Module D is the recycling credit (−11.9) and is never summed into an A–C total.

gwp_a1a3_alt (+A1/CML = 273, p10) retained only to drive a 'not comparable' warning against +A2 figures; both round to the same displayed total (273) though underlying A2/A3 sub-values differ slightly.

location.source_page=2 carries the place of production (Cameron Park address) and country; the second plant site 'Singleton' is named on p3 ('concrete plants in Cameron Park and Singleton'). sites[] therefore draws from p2-3.
